title: Origins: Mario
body:
For this to work, you need the Origins Mod.
You can choose a different character to become your origin to experience Minecraft.

This Origin is Coded in newest version of origin, so for lower versions or forge version, there may having bugs that not expected.

# Mario

**It's a-me, Mario!**

## Passives

- 💨Trained Movement
  - You move a little bit slipper(Makes you sprint jump faster).
- 🧱Wall Jump
  - You able to wall jump.
- 🏃‍♂️Boink
  - You able to deal damage when land on entity.
- 🍄1up
  - You can use Mushroom Stew as totem of undying, it will return a bowl.
## Active Ability
- ⏫Super Boost
  - When active (Primary_Active), Your next jump will able to charge, and let you jump higher( Only works on ground, pressing any movement key will boost you forward.). You take no fall damage.
